title: Fix Vercel AI large-repo edge cases
summary: Kage now hardens the Vercel AI edge cases: structural indexing skips symlinks/unreadable paths instead of crashing on broken README symlinks, overview/baseline reads use safe stat/read helpers, and diff/propose/branch ov
body:
Kage now hardens the Vercel AI edge cases: structural indexing skips symlinks/unreadable paths instead of crashing on broken README symlinks, overview/baseline reads use safe stat/read helpers, and diff/propose/branch overlay normalize Git repo-root status paths to project-relative paths when run inside a monorepo package. Regression tests cover broken symlink indexing and package-directory diff memory.
Evidence: Added tests: structural index skips broken symlinks instead of crashing; diff proposal from a package directory stores project-relative paths.
Verified by: npm test --prefix mcp
